title: Upon Chub.
content:
When Chub brings in his harvest, still he cries,
    "Aha, my boys! here's meat for Christmas pies!"
    Soon after he for beer so scores his wheat,
    That at the tide he has not bread to eat.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Upon Chub."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
